query:
SELECT id, title,
  SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(content, 'href="', -1), '"', 1) as first_link
FROM articles 
WHERE status = 'published' 
AND content LIKE '%href="http%'
LIMIT 10;
command:
